title: Cécile Busto-Gomez
content:
People.ContactEmail cbustogomez@mtiplus.ca
Cécile Busto-Gomez is a Paraprofessional in the immigration law group, based in our Toronto office. Cécile provides Canadian immigration services to major multinational companies. Passionate about immigration, she has over 10 years of immigration experience in more than 15 countries, including Canada. She is very familiar with temporary and permanent residence programs. Cécile has a master’s degree’s in public law from France and is a lawyer in Spain. Cécile is fluent in English, French and Spanish.
